request.title: Example regulated telemetry and reporting flow
request.summary: The team wants to capture application telemetry and make it available for reporting, quality review, and support workflows.

known_questions: Can regulated data enter telemetry fields or free-text comments?
Where is telemetry redacted, rejected, or validated before storage?
Who can access dashboards and exports?
How are tenant, user, session, and correlation identifiers handled?
